title: Google's Agents CLI: The CLI + Skills Combination to Ship AI Agents EASILY
summary: Google's Agents CLI is an open-source command-line tool that enables building and deploying AI agents to production in minutes. The tool provides agent identity, sandboxed code execution, and audit trails for production-grade deployment.
writeup: The video covers Google's Agents CLI, an open-source command-line tool for building and deploying AI agents to production in minutes. It matters because it targets production-grade concerns rather than prototypes, pairing the CLI with a skills approach to ship agents quickly. Key takeaways: the tool provides agent identity, sandboxed code execution, and audit trails.
